title: Develop a sports turf maintenance program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a sports turf maintenance program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine soil properties and plant health

pcs.text: Develop a soil and plant tissue testing program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a soil and plant tissue testing program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a soil and plant tissue testing program.

pcs.text: Monitor testing activities against testing program and initiate remedial action where activity does not comply
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor testing activities against testing program and initiate remedial action where activity does not comply?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor testing activities against testing program and initiate remedial action where activity does not comply.

pcs.text: Assess and interpret test results with due consideration of influencing factors, and record results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and interpret test results with due consideration of influencing factors, and record results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and interpret test results with due consideration of influencing factors, and record results.

pcs.text: Compare tests results with cultural requirements of turf grass species and determine nutritional status of the soil according to accepted industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare tests results with cultural requirements of turf grass species and determine nutritional status of the soil according to accepted industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare tests results with cultural requirements of turf grass species and determine nutritional status of the soil according to accepted industry standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine soil properties and plant health

elements.title: Identify the requirements of a sports turf maintenance program

pcs.text: Establish turf grass optimum presentation characteristics according to client requirements and industry best practice

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish turf grass optimum presentation characteristics according to client requirements and industry best practice.

pcs.text: Identify financial constraints for the turf area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify financial constraints for the turf area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify financial constraints for the turf area.

pcs.text: Identify maintenance requirements for varying conditions of turf growing cycle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify maintenance requirements for varying conditions of turf growing cycle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify maintenance requirements for varying conditions of turf growing cycle.

pcs.text: Select turf maintenance practices to maintain turf health according to sports turf standards of presentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select turf maintenance practices to maintain turf health according to sports turf standards of presentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select turf maintenance practices to maintain turf health according to sports turf standards of presentation.

pcs.text: Identify and verify availability of resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for the sports turf maintenance program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and verify availability of resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for the sports turf maintenance program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and verify availability of resources, tools, equipment and machinery required for the sports turf maintenance program.

pcs.text: Assess requirements and constraints, and document a sports turf playing surface maintenance program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess requirements and constraints, and document a sports turf playing surface maintenance program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess requirements and constraints, and document a sports turf playing surface maintenance program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify the requirements of a sports turf maintenance program

elements.title: Prepare and document the sports turf maintenance program

pcs.text: Prepare detailed plan, specifications and budget according to requirements of program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare detailed plan, specifications and budget according to requirements of program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare detailed plan, specifications and budget according to requirements of program.

pcs.text: Develop and document on-site procedures and schedules for the sports turf maintenance program

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document on-site procedures and schedules for the sports turf maintenance program.

pcs.text: Develop contingencies to ensure deadlines are met according to client and play requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop contingencies to ensure deadlines are met according to client and play requirements.

elements.title: Communicate sports turf maintenance program to key stakeholders

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Instruct work team and key stakeholders on turf maintenance program and procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor implementation of turf maintenance program, and provide feedback to work team and stakeholders.

elements.title: Review the sports turf maintenance program

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor performance of program against workplace standards, and record discrepancies.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review the sports turf maintenance program to ensure it remains responsive to changing conditions.

pcs.text: Adjust and make changes to the program to overcome discrepancies in program outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust and make changes to the program to overcome discrepancies in program outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust and make changes to the program to overcome discrepancies in program outcomes.

pcs.text: Document and report remedial action and changes to maintenance program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and report remedial action and changes to maintenance program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and report remedial action and changes to maintenance program.
